title: GitHub - overflowy/herdr-adversarial-review: Claude Code skill for adversarial code review - spawns a GPT‑5.6 Sol reviewer in a herdr split pane to attack your diff, then interrogates its findings before relaying verdicts.
excerpt: Claude Code skill for adversarial code review - spawns a GPT‑5.6 Sol reviewer in a herdr split pane to attack your diff, then interrogates its findings before relaying verdicts. - overflowy/herdr-a...
content_html:
A Claude Code skill that runs an adversarial code review using a second, independent model - GPT‑5.6 Sol - as the reviewer. Claude spawns the reviewer in a live herdr split pane, hands it your diff (or plan) plus the stated intent, waits for it to finish, then interrogates every finding against the actual code before relaying a verdict.

The reviewer runs interactively in its own pane, so you can watch it work or jump in and steer.

How the pieces fit together

Four things need to be set up, in order: herdr, CLIProxyAPI, agent-safehouse, and the safecodex shell function. Then install the skill itself.

Demo

adversarial-review-demo.mp4

1. Install herdr

herdr is the agent multiplexer the skill drives - it creates the reviewer pane, sends it input, and waits on its idle/working/blocked status.

curl -fsSL https://herdr.dev/install.sh | sh

Run your terminal sessions inside herdr (see the quick start). The skill assumes the Claude Code session it runs in lives in a herdr pane, so it can split a sibling pane next to it.

2. Install and configure CLIProxyAPI

CLIProxyAPI is a local proxy that exposes an Anthropic-compatible API backed by other providers' logins - here, an OpenAI/Codex login serving GPT‑5.6 Sol. This is what lets the stock claude CLI talk to a non-Anthropic model.

  1. Install - download a binary from the releases page (or use Docker; see the guides).

  2. Create the config at ~/.config/cli-proxy-api/config.yml:

    port: 8317
auth-dir: "~/.cli-proxy-api"
api-keys:
  - "<any-random-string>"   # e.g. output of: openssl rand -hex 24

    The API key is just a shared secret between the proxy and the claude CLI - make one up. Save it somewhere; the safecodex function needs it later.

  3. Log in with your OpenAI account (Codex OAuth flow):

    cli-proxy-api --config ~/.config/cli-proxy-api/config.yml --codex-login

  4. Start the server and leave it running:

    cli-proxy-api --config ~/.config/cli-proxy-api/config.yml

    The skill expects it on http://localhost:8317.

3. Install agent-safehouse

agent-safehouse provides macOS-native kernel-level sandboxing. The reviewer runs with --dangerously-skip-permissions, so the sandbox is what keeps it confined to the project directory - it can't touch your SSH keys, other repos, or anything outside its workspace.

brew install eugene1g/safehouse/agent-safehouse

Then add the safe wrapper to ~/.zshrc (adjust for your shell):

safe() {
    safehouse --env --add-dirs="/tmp" "$@"
}

The /tmp grant matters for this skill: it's where the handoff files live (the skill writes the review prompt to /tmp/adversarial-review/ and the reviewer writes its findings back there). Without it, the reviewer can't read its prompt or produce output.

4. Define the safecodex function

Add to ~/.zshrc (adjust for your shell):

export CLI_PROXY_API_KEY="<the key from your config.yml>"

safecodex() {
   ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8317 \
   ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="$CLI_PROXY_API_KEY" \
   ANTHROPIC_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
   ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
   CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
   CLAUDE_CODE_ALWAYS_ENABLE_EFFORT=1 \
   CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_TOOL_USE_CONCURRENCY=3 \
   ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=false \
   safe claude --model 'gpt-5.6-sol[1m]' --dangerously-skip-permissions "$@"
}

Reload your shell (exec zsh) and note that the function must be defined in your interactive shell config - the skill launches it via herdr pane run, which runs an interactive shell precisely so aliases and functions resolve.

5. Install the skill

The repo is a Claude Code plugin marketplace, so you can install it directly from within Claude Code:

/plugin marketplace add overflowy/herdr-adversarial-review
/plugin install adversarial-review@herdr-adversarial-review

Alternatively, copy the skill into your skills directory manually:

mkdir -p ~/.claude/skills/adversarial-review
cp skills/adversarial-review/SKILL.md ~/.claude/skills/adversarial-review/

Usage

From a Claude Code session running inside a herdr pane, in the project you want reviewed:

/adversarial-review

or just ask in natural language - "poke holes in this diff", "red-team this plan", "get a second opinion before I ship". Claude will:

  1. State the intent of the work (what the change is trying to achieve).
  2. Write the diff + reviewer charge to a prompt file under /tmp/adversarial-review/.
  3. Split a herdr pane and launch safecodex in it - the reviewer's TUI is live there.
  4. Wait for the review to finish (herdr tracks the agent's status natively).
  5. Interrogate every finding against the actual code, pressing the still-open reviewer session on anything disputed, and report each one as Confirmed, Disputed, or Unverified.

The last step matters: the reviewer is adversarial by instruction and will sometimes overstate or manufacture problems. You get verdicts, not raw output - and "nothing the reviewer found holds up" is a valid outcome.

Smoke test

Before first use, verify each layer:

# Proxy is up and accepting your key
curl -s http://localhost:8317/v1/models -H "x-api-key: $CLI_PROXY_API_KEY"

# safecodex works end to end (one-shot, no TUI)
safecodex -p "Say ok"

Troubleshooting

  • Reviewer pane opens but errors immediately - usually the proxy: check it's running on 8317 and that CLI_PROXY_API_KEY matches an entry in config.yml's api-keys.
  • Auth errors from the model - the Codex OAuth token may have expired; re-run the --codex-login step.
  • safecodex: command not found in the pane - the function isn't in your interactive shell config, or was only exported in one terminal. It must live in ~/.zshrc.
  • Sandbox denials - agent-safehouse grants read/write to the project directory only. If the review legitimately needs another path, add it to the safe wrapper's --add-dirs list.

License

MIT

blocks.html_en: The last step matters: the reviewer is adversarial by instruction and will sometimes overstate or manufacture problems. You get verdicts, not raw output - and "nothing the reviewer found holds up" is a valid outcome.

sentences.zh: 最后一步很重要：审稿人在指导上是敌对的，有时会夸大或制造问题。

sentences.en: You get verdicts, not raw output - and "nothing the reviewer found holds up" is a valid outcome.
sentences.zh: 您得到的是判决，而不是原始输出 - 并且“审阅者发现的任何内容都站不住脚”是一个有效的结果。

blocks.html_en: Smoke test

sentences.en: Smoke test
sentences.zh: 冒烟测试

blocks.html_en: Before first use, verify each layer:

sentences.en: Before first use, verify each layer:
sentences.zh: 首次使用前，验证每一层：

blocks.html_en: Troubleshooting

sentences.en: Troubleshooting
sentences.zh: 故障排除

blocks.html_en: • Reviewer pane opens but errors immediately - usually the proxy: check it's running on 8317 and that CLI_PROXY_API_KEY matches an entry in config.yml's api-keys.

sentences.en: Reviewer pane opens but errors immediately - usually the proxy: check it's running on 8317 and that CLI_PROXY_API_KEY matches an entry in config.yml's api-keys.
sentences.zh: 审阅器窗格打开，但立即出错 - 通常是代理：检查它是否在 8317 上运行，以及 CLI_PROXY_API_KEY 是否与 config.yml 的 api-keys 中的条目匹配。

blocks.html_en: • Auth errors from the model - the Codex OAuth token may have expired; re-run the --codex-login step.

sentences.en: Auth errors from the model - the Codex OAuth token may have expired; re-run the --codex-login step.
sentences.zh: 模型中的身份验证错误 - Codex OAuth 令牌可能已过期；重新运行 --codex-login 步骤。

blocks.html_en: • safecodex: command not found in the pane - the function isn't in your interactive shell config, or was only exported in one terminal. It must live in ~/.zshrc.

sentences.en: safecodex: command not found in the pane - the function isn't in your interactive shell config, or was only exported in one terminal.
sentences.zh: safecodex：在窗格中找不到命令 - 该函数不在您的交互式 shell 配置中，或者仅在一个终端中导出。

sentences.en: It must live in ~/.zshrc.
sentences.zh: 它必须位于 ~/.zshrc 中。

blocks.html_en: • Sandbox denials - agent-safehouse grants read/write to the project directory only. If the review legitimately needs another path, add it to the safe wrapper's --add-dirs list.

sentences.en: Sandbox denials - agent-safehouse grants read/write to the project directory only.
sentences.zh: 沙盒拒绝 - 代理安全屋仅授予对项目目录的读/写权限。

sentences.en: If the review legitimately needs another path, add it to the safe wrapper's --add-dirs list.
sentences.zh: 如果审查确实需要另一个路径，请将其添加到安全包装器的 --add-dirs 列表中。

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
克劳德代码技能，使用第二个独立模型 - GPT-5.6 Sol - 作为审核者运行对抗性代码审核。 Claude 在实时 Herdr 拆分窗格中生成审阅者，将您的差异（或计划）以及声明的意图交给它，等待它完成，然后根据实际代码询问每个发现，然后再转发结论。

审阅器在其自己的窗格中以交互方式运行，因此您可以观看它的工作或跳入并引导。

各个部分如何组合在一起

需要按顺序设置四件事：herdr、CLIProxyAPI、agent-safehouse 和 safecodex shell 函数。 然后安装技能本身。

Demo

adversarial-review-demo.mp4

1. 安装牧民

herdr 是技能驱动的代理多路复用器 - 它创建审阅者窗格，向其发送输入，并等待其空闲/工作/阻止状态。

curl -fsSL https://herdr.dev/install.sh | sh

在 herdr 中运行终端会话（请参阅快速入门）。 该技能假设它运行的 Claude Code 会话位于 herdr 窗格中，因此它可以拆分旁边的同级窗格。

2. 安装和配置 CLIProxyAPI

CLIProxyAPI 是一个本地代理，它公开由其他提供商的登录支持的与 Anthropic 兼容的 API - 此处是服务 GPT-5.6 Sol 的 OpenAI/Codex 登录。 这就是让库存克劳德 CLI 与非人类模型对话的原因。

  1. 安装 - 从发布页面下载二进制文件（或使用 Docker；请参阅指南）。
  2. 在 ~/.config/cli-proxy-api/config.yml 创建配置： port: 8317 auth-dir: "~/.cli-proxy-api" api-keys: - "<any-random-string>" # 例如输出： openssl rand -hex 24 API 密钥只是代理和 claude CLI 之间的共享秘密 - 请自行编写。 将其保存在某处； safecodex 函数稍后需要它。
  3. 使用您的 OpenAI 帐户登录（Codex OAuth 流程）： cli-proxy-api --config ~/.config/cli-proxy-api/config.yml --codex-login
  4. 启动服务器并使其保持运行： cli-proxy-api --config ~/.config/cli-proxy-api/config.yml 该技能需要在 http://localhost:8317 上运行。

3. 安装代理安全屋

agent-safehouse 提供 macOS 本机内核级沙箱。 审阅者使用 --dangerously-skip-permissions 运行，因此沙箱将其限制在项目目录中 - 它无法触及您的 SSH 密钥、其他存储库或其工作区之外的任何内容。

brew install eugene1g/safehouse/agent-safehouse

然后将安全包装器添加到 ~/.zshrc （根据您的 shell 进行调整）：

safe() {
    safehouse --env --add-dirs="/tmp" "$@"
}

/tmp 补助金对此技能很重要：它是移交文件所在的位置（该技能将审阅提示写入 /tmp/adversarial-review/ ，审阅者将其发现写回那里）。 如果没有它，审阅者将无法阅读其提示或生成输出。

4. 定义 safecodex 函数

添加到 ~/.zshrc （根据您的 shell 进行调整）：

export CLI_PROXY_API_KEY="<the key from your config.yml>"

safecodex() {
   ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8317 \
   ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="$CLI_PROXY_API_KEY" \
   ANTHROPIC_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
   ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
   CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL=gpt-5.6-sol \
   CLAUDE_CODE_ALWAYS_ENABLE_EFFORT=1 \
   CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_TOOL_USE_CONCURRENCY=3 \
   ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=false \
   safe claude --model 'gpt-5.6-sol[1m]' --dangerously-skip-permissions "$@"
}

重新加载您的 shell (exec zsh) 并注意，该函数必须在交互式 shell 配置中定义 - 该技能通过 herdr 窗格运行启动它，它精确地运行交互式 shell，以便解析别名和函数。

5. 安装技能

该存储库是 Claude Code 插件市场，因此您可以直接从 Claude Code 中安装它：

/plugin marketplace add overflowy/herdr-adversarial-review
/plugin install adversarial-review@herdr-adversarial-review

或者，手动将技能复制到您的技能目录中：

mkdir -p ~/.claude/skills/adversarial-review
cp skills/adversarial-review/SKILL.md ~/.claude/skills/adversarial-review/

Usage

从在 herdr 窗格内运行的 Claude Code 会话中，在您要查看的项目中：

/adversarial-review

或者只是用自然语言询问 - “在这个差异中找出漏洞”，“红队这个计划”，“在发货之前获得第二意见”。 克劳德将：

  1. 说明工作的意图（变革试图实现的目标）。
  2. 将 diff + 审阅者费用写入 /tmp/adversarial-review/ 下的提示文件。
  3. 拆分一个 herdr 窗格并在其中启动 safecodex - 审阅者的 TUI 就在那里。
  4. 等待审核完成（herdr 本地跟踪代理的状态）。
  5. 根据实际代码询问每一项发现，对任何有争议的问题进行仍处于开放状态的审阅者会议，并将每一项报告为已确认、有争议或未经验证。

最后一步很重要：审稿人在指导上是敌对的，有时会夸大或制造问题。 您得到的是判决，而不是原始输出 - 并且“审阅者发现的任何内容都站不住脚”是一个有效的结果。

冒烟测试

首次使用前，验证每一层：

# Proxy is up and accepting your key
curl -s http://localhost:8317/v1/models -H "x-api-key: $CLI_PROXY_API_KEY"

# safecodex works end to end (one-shot, no TUI)
safecodex -p "Say ok"

故障排除

  • 审阅器窗格打开，但立即出错 - 通常是代理：检查它是否在 8317 上运行，以及 CLI_PROXY_API_KEY 是否与 config.yml 的 api-keys 中的条目匹配。
  • 模型中的身份验证错误 - Codex OAuth 令牌可能已过期；重新运行 --codex-login 步骤。
  • safecodex：在窗格中找不到命令 - 该函数不在您的交互式 shell 配置中，或者仅在一个终端中导出。 它必须位于 ~/.zshrc 中。
  • 沙盒拒绝 - 代理安全屋仅授予对项目目录的读/写权限。 如果审查确实需要另一个路径，请将其添加到安全包装器的 --add-dirs 列表中。

执照

MIT
